  This repo accepts PROMPTS, not code.

  Add a single proposals/<slug>.md describing what you want built (copy
  proposals/TEMPLATE.md), then delete this comment. A maintainer reviews the
  prompt; once it's labeled `approved`, an agent runs it and opens the resulting
  code as its own PR.

  PRs that change files outside proposals/ are closed automatically (maintainers
  excepted). See proposals/README.md.
